creator: dave@mu.org
text:
Seahorse is a Gnome front end for GnuPG.

New port to add the to collection, Seahorse.
It is a tool for secure communications and data storage.
Data encryption and digital signature creation can easily
be performed through a GUI and Key Management operations
can easily be carried out through an intuitive interface.
The URL for Seahorse is http://seahorse.sourceforge.net/
The Seahorse port is located at:
http://www.mu.org/~dave/FreeBSD/seahorse.tar
